contract_claim: In verifyPackageContents(), `cliMatch` is the result of `stdout.match(...)` but is never used beyond a truthiness check. When the pattern matches, `bundleSize` is set to the size of the tarball file itself (L428-429), not the size of the cli.mjs entry inside it. This is misleading — the field is named `bundleSize` but actually returns total tarball size, same as what getPackageSize() returns.
observed_behavior: In verifyPackageContents(), `cliMatch` is the result of `stdout.match(...)` but is never used beyond a truthiness check. When the pattern matches, `bundleSize` is set to the size of the tarball file itself (L428-429), not the size of the cli.mjs entry inside it. This is misleading — the field is named `bundleSize` but actually returns total tarball size, same as what getPackageSize() returns.
